meta.title: Terms of Use
meta.description: By accessing Civic Awareness, you agree to use this website responsibly and in accordance with these terms.

cards.title: Website Usage
cards.text: The content on Civic Awareness is provided for educational and informational purposes only. You agree to use this website lawfully and respectfully.

cards.title: Content Ownership
cards.text: All articles, graphics, logos, and other materials published on this website are protected by applicable copyright and intellectual property laws unless otherwise stated.

cards.title: User Responsibility
cards.text: Visitors are responsible for how they use the information provided on this website. We encourage readers to verify important information through official sources whenever necessary.

cards.title: Changes to Terms
cards.text: We may update these Terms of Use at any time. Continued use of the website after changes are published indicates acceptance of the revised terms.
